wizard.err.answers_missing_metadata: dosye repons lan manke metadata wizard; relanse ak --migrate pou enpòte ansyen repons yo
wizard.err.invalid_schema_version: vèsyon schema a pa valab; yo te atann yon vèsyon semantik tankou 1.0.0
wizard.err.latest_policy_invalid: latest_policy dwe keep_latest oswa pin lè refs :latest yo itilize
wizard.err.latest_policy_pin_failed: pa t kapab fikse referans :latest la sou yon digest rezoud
wizard.err.latest_policy_required: repons wizard yo gen refs :latest; mete latest_policy sou keep_latest oswa pin
wizard.err.unsupported_source_ref_scheme: scheme source ref la pa sipòte
wizard.qa.assistant_template_source: Ki kote pou chaje modèl asistan an soti

wizard.qa.bundle_id.description: Idantifyan ki estab epi machin ka li, anjeneral an miniskil ak tirè.
wizard.qa.bundle_mode: Kisa ou vle fè ak bundle sa a?
wizard.qa.bundle_mode.create.description: Kreye yon nouvo konfigirasyon bundle ak sòti handoff la.
wizard.qa.bundle_mode.create.label: Kreye bundle
wizard.qa.bundle_mode.doctor.description: Enspekte epi repare pwoblèm konfigirasyon bundle san chanje kalite workflow la.

wizard.qa.bundle_mode.update.description: Rafrechi antre ak sòti bundle pou yon konfigirasyon bundle ki egziste deja.
wizard.qa.bundle_mode.update.label: Mete ajou bundle
wizard.qa.bundle_name.description: Non moun ka li ki itilize lè y ap prezante bundle ki pwodui a.

wizard.qa.bundle_output_path.description: Chemen final fichye .gtbundle pou pwodui pandan handoff bundle la.

wizard.qa.deployment_target.description: Anviwònman oswa platfòm sib la, pa egzanp local, dev, oswa prod.

wizard.qa.latest_policy.keep_latest.desc: Konsève etikèt mobil :latest la epi rezoud li ankò nan pwochen ekzekisyon yo.
wizard.qa.latest_policy.pin.description: Rezoud :latest kounye a epi sere digest konkrè a pou relansman detèminis.
wizard.qa.latest_policy.pin.label: Pin digest ki rezoud la
wizard.qa.output_dir: Ki kote pou ekri fichye bundle yo ki pwodui
wizard.qa.output_dir.description: Repètwa kote atifak bundle ki pwodui yo ak fichye handoff yo dwe ekri.
wizard.qa.provider_categories.descriptio: Kategori founisè separe pa vigil tankou llm, search, oswa storage.
wizard.qa.template_output_path: Ki kote pou ekri fichye modèl la

wizard.qa.template_source.description: Sous modèl la: sèvi ak yon chemen absoli, yon chemen relatif, yon referans oci://, repo://, oswa store://.
